channel.title: Puppies, National Puppy Day, Dog Training, Dog Health on For Pets With Love! Everything you want for your pet's needs.

item.title: National Puppy Day - Celebrating Our Furry Friends
item.description: National Puppy Day is a day to celebrate the joy and love that puppies bring into our lives. Whether you’re a new puppy parent or a seasoned dog owner, there’s always something to learn about raising a happy and healthy puppy.
